title: Sofia's Happy Numbers
synopsis: Sofia discovers numbers 1 through 5 while experiencing different happy feelings, from one cozy hug to five colorful balloons that make her giggle with joy.

pages.text: Sofia feels happy! Let's count with Sofia.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes stands smiling widely with arms outstretched, surrounded by large colorful numbers floating around her in a cheerful pattern
illustration.alt: Happy Sofia surrounded by colorful numbers

pages.text: ONE warm hug makes Sofia feel loved.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes receiving a gentle hug, with a large golden number 1 prominently displayed and heart shapes floating around them
illustration.alt: Sofia getting one hug with number 1

pages.text: TWO soft teddy bears make Sofia feel safe.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sitting between two fluffy teddy bears, with a bright blue number 2 clearly visible and cozy stars scattered around
illustration.alt: Sofia with two teddy bears and number 2

pages.text: THREE yummy cookies make Sofia feel excited.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes looking delighted at three round chocolate chip cookies arranged in a row, with a vibrant red number 3 and sparkles around the cookies
illustration.alt: Sofia looking at three cookies with number 3

pages.text: FOUR pretty flowers make Sofia feel peaceful.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes sitting peacefully among four colorful flowers, with a gentle green number 4 and soft petals floating in the air
illustration.alt: Sofia with four flowers and number 4

pages.text: FIVE bouncy balloons make Sofia giggle with joy!

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes laughing while holding five rainbow balloons, with a cheerful purple number 5 and confetti scattered everywhere
illustration.alt: Sofia laughing with five balloons and number 5

pages.text: Sofia loves counting! Numbers make her feel wonderful.

illustration.description: Sofia with long wavy dark brown hair, warm olive skin, big dark brown eyes dancing happily surrounded by all the numbers 1, 2, 3, 4, and 5 arranged in a beautiful rainbow pattern with all the objects from her counting adventure
illustration.alt: Sofia dancing with all numbers 1 through 5

metadata.illustrationStyle: clear countable objects, fun patterns, numbers prominent, visual counting, each number unique scene, engaging practice, organized arrangement, mathematical beauty

questions.question: How many teddy bears made Sofia feel safe?
questions.explanation: Sofia had two soft teddy bears that made her feel safe and cozy.

questions.question: What made Sofia giggle with joy?
questions.explanation: Five bouncy balloons made Sofia giggle with joy!

questions.question: How many flowers made Sofia feel peaceful?
questions.explanation: Four pretty flowers made Sofia feel peaceful and calm.
